content:
✨ shannon | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated, white-box penetration testing of web applications and APIs.
✨ Key Features: • Fully Autonomous Operation • Reproducible Proof-of-Concept Exploits • OWASP Vulnerability Coverage • Code-Aware Dynamic Testing • Parallel Processing
📖 Summary: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes source code to identify potential attack vectors and then executes real exploits to validate vulnerabilities before they reach production, providing reproducible proof-of-concept exploits.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
